languages.text: {n}Ледяной взгляд гиганта прошибает насквозь, и ваши ладони предательски влажнеют.{/n} "Нет, человек".

traits.locale_text: {n}Ледяной взгляд гиганта прошибает насквозь, и ваши ладони предательски влажнеют.{/n} "Нет, человек".

languages.text: {n}The giant's icy stare pierces through you, and your palms become treacherously clammy.{/n} "No, human."
languages.original_text: {n}Ледяной взгляд гиганта прошибает насквозь, и ваши ладони предательски влажнеют.{/n} "Нет, человек".

{n}The giant's icy stare pierces through you, and your palms become treacherously clammy.{/n} "No, human."

languages.text: {n}巨人冰冷的注视将你刺穿，你的手心不争气地渗出冷汗。{/n}“不行，人类。”
languages.original_text: {n}The giant's icy stare pierces through you, and your palms become treacherously clammy.{/n} "No, human."

traits.locale_text: {n}巨人冰冷的注视将你刺穿，你的手心不争气地渗出冷汗。{/n}“不行，人类。”

languages.text: {n}La mirada gélida del gigante te atraviesa y tus manos empiezan a sudar, traicionándote.{/n} «No, human{mf|o|a}».
languages.original_text: {n}The giant's icy stare pierces through you, and your palms become treacherously clammy.{/n} "No, human."

traits.locale_text: {n}La mirada gélida del gigante te atraviesa y tus manos empiezan a sudar, traicionándote.{/n} «No, human{mf|o|a}».

languages.text: {n}Le regard glacé du géant vous transperce, et bien malgré vous, vos paumes deviennent moites.{/n} « Non, {mf|humain|humaine}. »
languages.original_text: {n}The giant's icy stare pierces through you, and your palms become treacherously clammy.{/n} "No, human."

traits.locale_text: {n}Le regard glacé du géant vous transperce, et bien malgré vous, vos paumes deviennent moites.{/n} « Non, {mf|humain|humaine}. »

languages.text: {n}Devin buz gibi bakışları içini delip geçiyor. Avuçların sana ihanet edercesine terliyor.{/n} "Hayır insan."
languages.original_text: {n}The giant's icy stare pierces through you, and your palms become treacherously clammy.{/n} "No, human."

traits.locale_text: {n}Devin buz gibi bakışları içini delip geçiyor. Avuçların sana ihanet edercesine terliyor.{/n} "Hayır insan."

languages.text: {n}Als dich der eisige Blick des Riesen durchbohrt, werden deine Handflächen verräterisch feucht.{/n} "Nein, Mensch."
languages.original_text: {n}The giant's icy stare pierces through you, and your palms become treacherously clammy.{/n} "No, human."

traits.locale_text: {n}Als dich der eisige Blick des Riesen durchbohrt, werden deine Handflächen verräterisch feucht.{/n} "Nein, Mensch."

languages.text:
{n}巨人の氷のように冷たい視線があなたを貫き、手のひらは不気味に濡れてくる。{/n}
「人間、ダメだ」
